subject: A lean, alert dog standing on a wooden surface inside a dim, cluttered interior, ears pricked and body tense as if reacting to something unseen
description: A scrappy, short-haired dog with mottled brown and tan fur stands rigid on what appears to be a wooden floor or low platform, head turned and ears raised in a wary, attentive posture. The dog's body is taut, suggesting it has just caught wind of something threatening. The interior setting is dim and oppressive, rendered in deep greens and murky browns, with vague shapes suggesting cluttered furniture, beams, or debris in the background. A faint sickly green light filters through the gloom, giving the scene a haunted, claustrophobic atmosphere consistent with the Duskmourn horror-house aesthetic.
foreground: alert short-haired dog standing on wooden surface
background: dim cluttered interior with sickly green light and indistinct furniture or debris
emotion: tense, alert, wary — body braced, ears up, gaze fixed off-frame
